notes: SHIP v1.14.322 - nav polish pass on the .321 Option C grid (owner 'sorry can we build it' - delegated the 6-axis combo from phantom-nav-lab-2.html, I picked the cold-aisle-optimal set). Combo built: glow=unified cyan (Exit red) [channel-safe, no per-icon status confusion]; labels=Active [icon-only at rest, label on active - overflow-proof]; bar=Flush [max gloved tap target]; active=Glow+Dim [unchanged, no re-added underline]; fill=GLASS [NEW]; icon size=LARGE [NEW]. TWO CSS edits vs .321: (1) #rd-botnav background -> translucent glass linear-gradient(180deg,rgba(12,18,24,.6),rgba(6,9,13,.9)) + backdrop-filter:blur(18px) + -webkit- (page content blurs behind the fixed nav; the .287 GPU layer translateZ stays); (2) #rd-botnav .bicon 22px -> 28px (+27%, gloved reach). Everything else from .321 UNCHANGED (grid, display:none default + body.rd gate, position:fixed, EXIT #ff5a4d, hold-to-exit JS, 'Cart' label). Gates: brace balance unchanged (2 value-only CSS edits), all 4 inline <script> blocks compile, sw.js compiles, triple .321->.322 lockstep, CRLF working tree preserved. ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Browser-verified @390: 4 icons larger + crisp, glass bar shows content blur behind, active-label + cyan glow intact, EXIT red. NOT taken from the lab (available as 1-line follow-ups if owner wants): per-icon semantic glow (needs channel-map colors), Float/Raised bar (costs tap width + edge gutter), Underbar/Lift active state (underbar would partially restore the deleted reactor rail), Always/Off labels. DEVICE-VERIFY (John, phone): nav icons noticeably bigger + easier to hit gloved; bar reads as frosted glass over the page; everything else same as .321. NEXT: N-12 phase stepper (backlog).
